Initializer# init(name:channelEncoding:textureDimensions:turbidity:sunElevation:sunAzimuth:upperAtmosphereScattering:groundAlbedo:)

iOS 11.0+iPadOS 11.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.13+tvOS 11.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
init(
    name: String?,
    channelEncoding: MDLTextureChannelEncoding,
    textureDimensions: vector_int2,
    turbidity: Float,
    sunElevation: Float,
    sunAzimuth: Float,
    upperAtmosphereScattering: Float,
    groundAlbedo: Float
)
```
